item.title: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.5.26
item.description:
Product: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.5.26
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Tue, 24 Feb 2026 11:54:27 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Override library implementing ZMQ lazy pirate reliable request reply (RRR) protocal using RemoteControl SMO framework.

Release Notes: [1.3.5]
fixing issues with ZMQ logging
- move logging ownership to context manager
- add socket counter
- add context ID
- update ZMQ.connect and close to increment/decrement socket counter
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Build Support (System) v1.8.4.32
item.description:
Product: Build Support (System) v1.8.4.32
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Tue, 24 Feb 2026 09:00:29 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Miscellaneous VIs help build applications and packages

Release Notes: [1.8.4]
- bugfix in "Create build_all.bat" fix: delimiter between paths should be ' ^' not '^'
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Build Support v1.8.4.32
item.description:
Product: Build Support v1.8.4.32
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Tue, 24 Feb 2026 09:00:28 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Miscellaneous VIs help build applications and packages

Release Notes: [1.8.4]
- bugfix in "Create build_all.bat" fix: delimiter between paths should be ' ^' not '^'
item.dc:creator: Levylab

item.title: Multichannel Lockin v3.3.2.70
item.description:
Product: Multichannel Lockin v3.3.2.70
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 23 Feb 2026 23:34:21 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: - build with ZMQ 1.3.4
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.1.33

Product: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.1.33

Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Drivers and UI for Krohn-Hite 7008 multichannel amplifiers.

Release Notes: - build with ZMQ 1.3.4
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Multichannel Lockin for National Instruments' Dynamic Signal Acquisition hardware (4431, 4461, 4462).
- This version is configured to handle multiple cards for simultaneous, synchronized AI/AO.
- The analog outputs can be configured to output sine, square, sawtooth, or triangle functions with (swept) DC offsets.
- Each of the analog inputs can be demodulated at multiple frequencies.

Release Notes: - build with ZMQ 1.3.4

item.title: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.4.25
item.description:
Product: RemoteControl.ZMQ v1.3.4.25
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 23 Feb 2026 17:32:08 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Override library implementing ZMQ lazy pirate reliable request reply (RRR) protocal using RemoteControl SMO framework.

Release Notes: [1.3.4]
- fix connection log error handling and header creation
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.0.31
item.description:
Product: Krohn-Hite-7008 v2.6.0.31
Company: LevyLab
Release Date: Mon, 23 Feb 2026 14:57:29 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Drivers and UI for Krohn-Hite 7008 multichannel amplifiers.

Release Notes: [2.6.0]
#34:
- Switch to termination-character-driven reads instead of polling bytes at port
- Flush i/o buffer before each write
- fix error handling to set -999 errors error?==T flag (previously error -999 would be reported but error?==F)
- add User Data to track initialized conection, and number of available channels in the chassis
- change startup sequence to better handle existing visa connections: ask user to close them or switch to simulated KH7008
item.dc:creator: LevyLab

item.title: Build Support (System) v1.8.3.31
item.description:
Product: Build Support (System) v1.8.3.31
Company: Levylab
Release Date: Mon, 23 Feb 2026 08:39:30 -0500
Packager: Patrick Irvin

Description: Miscellaneous VIs help build applications and packages

Release Notes: [1.8.3]
- build_vip.bat.template: Create tag after checking out main and merging, so the tag points to the commit on main, not develop. then finish by checking out develop
item.dc:creator: Levylab
